note: Rubbing holding collections. Coordinates are the HOLDING institution location (approximate), distinct from the inscription site. harvested_count = records in the staging harvest. Japan Search collections are accessed via the aggregator (via: Japan Search). See schemas/ for per-connector field mappings. Includes catalog-only / offline collections (catalog_only:true) documented in the obsidian vault — print or PDF catalogs, no online harvest; coordinates are the holding institution. Each collection has continent/country (+ province for China) for the geo tree, and an 'authority' id linking to its Institution authority record where one exists. Plus 8 Japanese collections newly identified by the Japan Search db-facet survey (connector japan-search, harvested_count 0, fdb + js_browse + mentions) — see schemas/japan-search-databases.md.

collections.label: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, UC Berkeley
collections.label_zh: 加州大學柏克萊分校 C.V. Starr 東亞圖書館

collections.label: University of Tokyo
collections.rubbing_site_note: 東洋文化研究所 拓本文字データベース / 関野貞 中国碑碣拓本資料アーカイブ — ~5,000 rubbings, 1.8M characters (Han–Xinhai)

collections.label: Japan Search · other collections
collections.aggregates: union of misc Japan Search databases

collections.label: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (union database)
collections.holdings: Union finding-aid aggregating Chinese rubbings held by European institutions (>10,000 records). EFEO's own holding ~379.
collections.access: Aggregator / finding-aid — links to Chinese rubbings across European institutions. Linked for discovery only; harvest each collection from its OWN website, never from EFEO directly.
collections.aggregates: Société asiatique, Musée Guimet, IHEC/Collège de France, Bodleian, British Library, Rietberg + EFEO's own ~379 — >10,000 records across Europe

collections.label: Indianapolis Museum of Art at Newfields

collections.label: Field Museum of Natural History
collections.catalog: @Tchen_Starr1981 — Catalogue of Chinese Rubbings from Field Museum, ed. Hartmut Walravens (Fieldiana Anthropology n.s. 3; Chicago, 1981)
collections.access: print catalog only
collections.holdings: ≈4,000+ Chinese rubbings
collections.note: Noted for >4,000 Chinese rubbings (四千余件). Includes the Qionglai Longxing Monastery 邛崍龍興寺 Diamond-Sutra batch (inv. 233776) collected via D.C. Graham 葛維漢; studied by Zhang Zong 張總.
collections.source: obsidian vault — Walravens catalog (@Tchen_Starr1981) + Zhang Zong

collections.label: Société asiatique
collections.holdings: 1,500+ sheets (~1,200 with photographs); bulk of Chavannes' rubbings; Longmen, Beilin
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: Musée national des arts asiatiques – Guimet
collections.label_zh: 吉美國立亞洲藝術博物館
collections.holdings: ≥1,000 (Chavannes; Segalen–Lartigue Han; d'Ollone mission)
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: Institut des hautes études chinoises (Collège de France)
collections.holdings: ~700 Tang epitaphs (~600 from Henan; Robert des Rotours, 1933)
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: Bodleian Libraries, University of Oxford
collections.holdings: Lockhart (Sinica 461–515) & Backhouse ink-squeezes; count unpublished
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: British Library
collections.holdings: Confirmed holder (EFEO DB); count unpublished. (IDP = manuscripts, not rubbings)
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: Museum Rietberg
collections.holdings: Confirmed holder (EFEO DB); count unpublished
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: Bibliothèque nationale de France
collections.holdings: ≥10,000 sheets (Pelliot, Beilin/Xi'an) + Chavannes/Segalen — plausibly Europe's largest; NOT in EFEO DB; no published total
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: Buddhist Stone Sutras in China (Heidelberg Academy)
collections.label_zh: 中國佛教石經（海德堡科學院）
collections.holdings: Western scholarly corpus of Buddhist stone-sutra rubbings (Shandong/Henan/Hebei/Shaanxi/Sichuan/Fangshan); dir. L. Ledderose
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: Ashmolean Museum, University of Oxford
collections.holdings: Chinese rubbings sub-collection (Eastern Art Online); mostly Beilin, Xi'an
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: Musée Cernuschi
collections.holdings: ~400 Chinese rubbings (single-source); 2025–26 exhibition « Chine. Empreintes du passé »
collections.access: Holdings documented; no dedicated online catalogue.

collections.label: Victoria & Albert Museum
collections.label_zh: 維多利亞與艾伯特博物館
collections.holdings: Nestorian Stele rubbing E.690-1922 (paper+ink, 321×126 cm, acq. 1922)
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: National Museums Scotland
collections.holdings: Ink rubbings of the Wu Liang Shrine (Han) and the Nestorian Stele
collections.access: Holdings documented; no dedicated online catalogue.

collections.label: SOAS University of London
collections.holdings: Chinese Rubbings digital collection (e.g. a Guanyin stele rubbing); count unpublished
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: Cambridge University Library
collections.holdings: CUDL Chinese rubbings series; count unpublished (oracle bones/Wade are NOT rubbings)
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: Biblioteca Apostolica Vaticana
collections.holdings: Nestorian Stele rubbing Barb. or. 151 (DigiVatLib); Jesuit-era materials
collections.access: Online catalogue / digital collection.

collections.label: British Museum
collections.holdings: Nestorian Stele rubbing 1989,1004 (Beilin, Xi'an); confirmed holder (EFEO DB)
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: Museum of Far Eastern Antiquities (Östasiatiska museet)
collections.holdings: Confirmed holder (EFEO DB; own DB Carlotta); Karlgren bronze-inscription context
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: National Gallery Prague (Národní galerie Praha)
collections.holdings: Confirmed holder (EFEO DB); count unpublished (the Czech holder is the National Gallery, not Náprstek)
collections.catalogue: EFEO · « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » (dir. J.-P. Drège; CCK Foundation; European total >10,000)
collections.access: Catalogued in the EFEO « Estampages chinois conservés en Europe » database.

collections.label: National Museum of Korea / e-museum portal
collections.holdings: e-museum aggregates 407 institutions (2,477 takbon); NMK's own ~658 + colonial-era survey (~800 N-Korean + ~1,300 S-Korean rubbings)

collections.label: Korean Epigraphy DB (한국금석문) — NRICH
collections.holdings: 6,557 records — transcriptions, interpretations, rubbings, images; Silla–Joseon (gsm.nrich.go.kr retired -> 지식이음 portal)

collections.label: Kyujanggak Institute for Korean Studies (SNU)
collections.holdings: Mainly old books; rubbings NOT a distinct collection (holds epigraphic compilation books 大東金石書 / 海東金石苑). Web-only (kyudb.snu.ac.kr).

collections.label: Jangseogak, Academy of Korean Studies
collections.holdings: ~370 jong rubbings (봉평비, 냉수리비, royal-tomb, 어필). kostma OpenAPI exists; rubbing-specific coverage unconfirmed.

collections.label: National Library of Korea
collections.holdings: Collects 금석문 (epigraphy); no published takbon count. Open APIs (data4library.kr) are bibliographic — takbon-specific querying unconfirmed.

collections.label: Sungkyunkwan University Museum
collections.holdings: ~1,000 takbon (Cho Dong-won 조동원 donation ~400); Ulju Cheonjeon-ri, Bongamsa stele (Choe Chi-won). Request-only.

collections.label: Seoul Calligraphy Museum (Seoul Arts Center)
collections.holdings: 74 pieces / 217 sheets repatriated rubbings (Ogawa Keikichi -> Gana donation 2011); National-Treasure rank (Changnyeong Jinheung stele). Web DB, no API.

collections.label: Buddhist Central Museum (Jogye Order)
collections.holdings: ~750+ new rubbings 2014–2023 (금석문 탁본조사 사업; against a 2013 census of 11,489 inscriptions). No catalogue/API.

collections.label: Dongguk University Museum
collections.holdings: Premier Buddhist-epigraphy university museum; count unknown. Surfaces via the e-museum API (no own catalogue).
